title: Sokimex and Government revisit Angkor deal | The Phnom Penh Post
highlights:
Cambodian Government has hammered out a new agreement with private company Sokimex over the ticket sales to the famed Angkor temples near Siem Reap. The agreement, reached at an interministerial meeting on Aug 15, may bring higher revenue to the Government.
